productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boy Power Punch White Tshirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print Dress your little one in this T-shirt from Green Gold's collection and watch him flaunt his prowess as the saviour of Dholakpur - chhota bheem - in style. Crafted from pure and environmentally safe cotton, this tee offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers or shorts.
